title: Real manual source ingestion (Level-1)
problem: The ingest spine is real and GT01-proven but every ingested source is labeled source_type=fixture. Operators need a deterministic path to ingest real local .txt/.md creativity sources into the private graph with correct manual_text labeling, title override, idempotent re-ingest, and safety proofs (no export leak, no model authority).
acceptance_criteria: ingest accepts --source-type (default fixture) and --source-title; real sources use manual_text.
fetcher.fetch_local_text_file no longer forces source_type; .md supported.
Deterministic idempotent re-ingest: sources count stays 1, chunk IDs identical.
GT01 back-compat: ingest without --source-type still uses fixture.
No export by default; safety audit pass; local_path/raw text never exported.
No model authority: no LLM import; claims/concepts/relationships empty after ingest.
Unit tests under tests/unit/; 140 golden tests stay green.
non_goals: No URL fetch, PDF parse, source_discovery, or candidate_ranker.
No LLM/OpenAI/cloud, claim extraction, concept linking, or export.
No schema migration or validator change.
rollback_plan: Revert CLI flags and fetcher source_type removal; GT01 unchanged.
